verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Your love is extravagant Your friendship, is intimate I feel like moving to the rhythm of your grace Your fragrance is intoxicating, in our secret place Your love is extravagant

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Spread wide in the arms of Christ, is the love that covers sin. No greater love have I ever known; You considered me your friend. Capture my heart again.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Your love is extravagant Your friendship is intimate I feel like moving to the rhythm of your grace Your fragrance is intoxicating in our secret place
